violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fronts and sides of all kitchen equipment-coolers etc. -Clean all shelving in dishwash area.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Bar d/w at 0 ppm when tested.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors walls and ceiling in kitchen and d/w areas.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Paint drywall in prep area, paint floors in kitchen and walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw burger above bacon cooked beef and fish in walk in cooler. -Raw burger above ready to eat chicken in white fridge.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in dishwash area. -Clean fronts sides and handles of all kitchen equipment.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors need repainted throughout kitchen and walk in cooler. -Tape and paint drywall in cook line area.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Bacon sitting in grease from previous days at 75F.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
